description: Deterministic heading tree over GDPR (Regulation (EU) 2016/679), Markdown converted from the official EUR-Lex XHTML by scripts/eurlex_html_to_markdown.py. No LLM, no summaries. The Markdown-native twin of IDX-PDF-textheadings-gdpr: structurally parallel (126 nodes), differing only in representation (line vs page addressing; clean HTML-derived text vs PDF extraction). NOTE: the PDF arm's node TITLES are degraded by PDF extraction (long article rubrics truncated at the first wrapped line; e.g. 'off icer' spacing) whereas this arm's titles/text are clean — an instance of the text-fidelity variable, not a structural difference. Article-id scoring is unaffected.

source.conversion: scripts/eurlex_html_to_markdown.py — EUR-Lex ELI/CONVEX classed paragraphs -> depth-nested Markdown headings (Chapter #, Section ##, Article ##/### by nesting, Recitals (Preamble) #). Deterministic; workspace/ is scratch, pinned here by sha256.
